arts.ttl: Thiago Motta: ‘The attacking phase is not just Vlahovic’s job. That’s why McKennie plays’
arts.sum: Juventus head coach Thiago Motta shared his thoughts with Sky Sport before his team’s Champions League match against PSV Eindhoven. The Italian manager emphasized the importance of a collective approach and addressed key aspects of the team’s strategy. Motta began by highlighting the significance of the occasion, stating, “It’s a great football atmosphere to experience to the fullest. From now on, we must be serious and focused for every minute that passes. They like to play just as we do.” When asked about the increased level of competition in Europe, Motta responded, “Always, every match has its own story. arts.ttl: Is Weston McKennie playing for Juventus in the Champions League against PSV Eindhoven?
arts.sum: The 26-year-old has been restricted to just one substitute appearance in those four four league fixtures and he’s unlikely to start against PSV on Tuesday. Juventus begin their Champions League campaign today against PSV Eindhoven, returning to European soccer’s elite club competition after missing out in 2023/24.
